case_title: DEBBIE GEE VS. MANPRIYA K SAMRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $2,246.47 COSTS, $8,550.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,796.47, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE SERVED JAN-22-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF NON-ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 779 30TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94121, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$150 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $2,373.47 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $4,650.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAMRA, MANPRIYA K AKA MUNPRIYA K. SAMRA MOUSAVINIA, YALDA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, DEBBIE SERVED DEC-28-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
